revision.comment: templates do not belong in content categories & recommended to place them in template categories per [[WP:CAT#T]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Nagasaki | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | title = [[File:Shadow picture of Nagasaki prefecture.png|20x20px|Shadow picture of Nagasaki Prefecture]][[Nagasaki Prefecture]] | above = [[Nagasaki]] <small>([[List of capitals in Japan|capital]])</small> | image = [[File:Flag of Nagasaki Prefecture.svg|60px|border|Flag of Nagasaki Prefecture]] | listclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Core cities of Japan|Core cities]] | list1 = *[[Nagasaki]] *[[Sasebo]]
| group2 = Cities | list2 = *[[Gotō, Nagasaki|Gotō]] *[[Hirado, Nagasaki|Hirado]] *[[Iki, Nagasaki|Iki]] *[[Isahaya, Nagasaki|Isahaya]] *[[Matsuura, Nagasaki|Matsuura]] *[[Minamishimabara]] *[[Ōmura, Nagasaki|Ōmura]] *[[Saikai, Nagasaki|Saikai]] *[[Shimabara, Nagasaki|Shimabara]] *[[Unzen, Nagasaki|Unzen]] *[[Tsushima, Nagasaki|Tsushima]]
| group3 = Districts | list3 = *[[Higashisonogi District, Nagasaki|Higashisonogi District]] **[[Hasami, Nagasaki|Hasami]] **[[Higashisonogi, Nagasaki|Higashisonogi]] **[[Kawatana, Nagasaki|Kawatana]] *[[Kitamatsuura District, Nagasaki|Kitamatsuura District]] **[[Ojika, Nagasaki|Ojika]] **[[Saza, Nagasaki|Saza]] *[[Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki|Minami-Matsuura District]] **[[Shin-Kamigotō]] *[[Nishisonogi District, Nagasaki|Nishisonogi District]] **[[Nagayo, Nagasaki|Nagayo]] **[[Togitsu, Nagasaki|Togitsu]]
| below = [[List of mergers in Nagasaki Prefecture]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] </noinclude>
